ValidationRule.description: Phone number format shall always start by "+" and contain a country code
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),NOT (ISBLANK(Phone)) && NOT( REGEX( Phone , "^\\+([0-9 ]+)$" ) && LEN( SUBSTITUTE(Phone , " ", "") ) < 26 && LEN( SUBSTITUTE(Phone , " ", "") ) > 6 ) && $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a phone number starting with "+" and a country code (Example : +33 142 86 XX XX)
